name: ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card

domestic: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access applies to both primary and add-on cardholders, with no spend-based criteria.
international: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access applies to both primary and add-on cardholders, with no spend-based criteria.
Complimentary Priority Pass membership for both the primary and Plus cardholder
Comp Priority Pass is provided to primary and Plus cardholders; guest visits are charged at USD 27 plus GST.

joiningBenefits: 12,500 ICICI Bank Reward Points (worth Rs 12,500) on payment of joining fee
Complimentary one-year Taj Epicure Plus membership including one-night stay voucher (worth Rs 12,000) on card activation
Complimentary one-year EazyDiner Prime membership (worth Rs 2,995) on card activation
renewalBenefits: 12,500 ICICI Bank Reward Points (worth Rs 12,500) on payment of annual fee
Complimentary annual renewal of Taj Epicure and EazyDiner Prime memberships
milestoneBenefits: EaseMyTrip air travel voucher worth Rs 3,000 on reaching Rs 4 lakh annual spend
Additional EaseMyTrip air travel voucher worth Rs 3,000 on reaching Rs 8 lakh annual spend
additionalBenefits: Unlimited complimentary golf rounds and lessons every month at premier courses
Complimentary Priority Pass membership for both the primary and Plus cardholder
Buy-One-Get-One (BOGO) movie, show or event tickets worth up to Rs 750 via BookMyShow, up to twice a month
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% on transactions up to Rs 4,000

salaried: Invite-only; typically offered to ICICI Bank Global Private Client / Private Banking customers
Requires a net monthly salary of ₹3 Lakh or more
Existing ICICI Bank credit cardholders with a credit limit of ₹10 Lakh or more are preferred
selfEmployed: Invite-only; typically offered to ICICI Bank Global Private Client / Private Banking customers
Requires a high annual income / ITR (typically ₹36 Lakh or more)
Existing ICICI Bank credit cardholders with a credit limit of ₹10 Lakh or more are preferred

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank product page, reward terms, and Truztee golf booking rules.
Base reward rate is 6 points per Rs 200 spend (3% return value on travel booking, 1.2% return value on statement credit).
iShop accelerated rewards (12X on hotels, 6X on flights) are capped at 18,000 points per month and 10,000 points per day.
Utility, grocery, and education spends earn base rewards but are subject to separate, individual monthly caps of 1,000 points per category.
Unlimited domestic and international lounge access applies to both primary and add-on cardholders, with no spend-based criteria.
Comp Priority Pass is provided to primary and Plus cardholders; guest visits are charged at USD 27 plus GST.
Unlimited complimentary golf rounds and lessons can be booked via Truztee platform; cancellations require 24 hours notice.
Exclusions include fuel, rent, government services, tax payments, and e-wallet loading.
BookMyShow BOGO offers up to Rs 750 off on a minimum of 2 tickets, twice a calendar month.
Air Accident Insurance cover is up to Rs 3 crore for primary cardholder, subject to card usage terms.
